children.name: hwL2VlanPrecedence
children.description:
Determine whether to select the MAC-based VLAN or subnet-based VLAN,
                      1:MAC VLAN(default);  2:IPSUBNET VLAN.

children.name: hwMuxVlanUpperThreshold
children.description: Upper threshold for the number of group VLANs in a principal VLAN.

children.name: hwVlantransIfIndex
children.description: Index of the interface that has vlan mapping or vlan stacking configured.

children.name: hwVlantransVlanPriBgn
children.description: The begin mapping or stacking vlan-priority configurations on the interface.

children.name: hwMuxVlanLowerThreshold
children.description: Lower threshold for the number of group VLANs in a principal VLAN.

children.name: hwVcmpDeviceMac
children.description: MAC address of a device running VCMP

children.name: hwPrincipalVlanID
children.description: Principal VLAN ID of a MUX VLAN.

children.name: hwVlantransInnerVlanEnd
children.description: The end mapping or stacking inner vlan configurations on the interface.

children.name: hwVlantransVlanBgn
children.description: The begin mapping or stacking vlan configurations on the interface.

children.name: hwVlantransIfName
children.description: The interface name has vlan mapping or vlan stacking configured.

children.name: hwL2VlanMIBTable
children.description: This table shows the VLAN status information. It describes information about a VLAN, such as the type, interface list, and current status of the VLAN.
